review_title: The best tool to develop business application rapidly
description: In general, this software is updating constantly and it is developing new functions to improve our applications. Now, we can upgrade our before versions faster and efficiently. I recommend this software to incorporate as main software development tools into the development teams.
author: Henry W.
pros: The applications can be designed in only one environment and test it immediately. You can ensure the correct output. You can show the beta version of your application to achieve approval before moving to the production environment. This software allows us the integration between different team works, for instance, the database developers and software developers, the software developers with QA testers, etc.
cons: I suggest add a project explorer to organize all projects and their versions and other metadata about the projects.

description: ASPRunner.NET has revolutionized how our team builds database-driven web applications. What once took weeks of manual coding—designing forms, writing CRUD logic, implementing security, and creating reports—now happens in hours or a single day. The wizard-based interface is exceptionally intuitive and easy to use, allowing both experienced developers and junior team members to produce professional, secure results with minimal training. Drag-and-drop customization, built-in user authentication, role-based access, export/import features, charts, and responsive templates make development fast and enjoyable without sacrificing quality or flexibility. We've deployed complex internal tools, customer portals, inventory systems, and approval workflows at a fraction of the usual time and cost. ASPRunner enables true rapid development, keeps our company agile, dramatically reduces backlog, and lets us deliver business value faster than ever before. It's become an essential part of our toolkit—highly recommended for any organization that values speed without compromising on robust, maintainable applications.1.6sFast
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: "ASPRunner has been a game-changer for our team, dramatically saving time by generating robust database-driven web applications in minutes instead of weeks. Its intuitive, wizard-based interface makes it exceptionally easy to use even for developers with varying experience levels, while enabling rapid development of secure, feature-rich solutions that meet our business needs quickly and efficiently."
cons: he only notable drawback we've encountered is that importing or upgrading projects between major versions can sometimes require manual tweaks—such as adjusting event code syntax or re-mapping elements—rather than being fully seamless and automatic. While the process is generally straightforward and well-documented, it would be even better with a one-click, more robust import wizard for version transitions. That said, these are truly minor hurdles with no crashes, data loss, or core functionality problems; the software remains highly stable, reliable, and effective overall for rapid development needs.

author: Damien S.
pros: Being new to web design I needed a product that had good features and was easy to use. ASPrunner.net checked all the boxes.
cons: Install instructions could have been a bit more detailed. Probably because I was just learning so not a huge concern.

description: I have used ASPRunner.NET for over eight years to rapidly develop web-based applications, often delivering solutions within hours. This capability has been invaluable for quickly addressing team needs and improving operational efficiency. The platform has saved over 1,000 man-hours compared to traditional development methods, while its active user forum ensures quick support. Notably, I developed a patient tracking system for post-discharge services, enabling faster response times and consistent compliance with State SLAs. This solution not only improved patient outcomes but also exceeded State performance targets, placing our organization in a top-tier category and enhancing our department’s reputation for delivering effective, timely solutions.
author: Ray M.
pros: Easy to use and a full suite of capabilities. Affordability bang for buck A professional interface that has improved over the years
cons: A learning curve - like all applications, it took some time to get the hang of the workflowe A little difficulty integrating with other third-party solutions.

description: Use it for many things, from simple client share's to benchmarking reporting, value workflow and cost management analysis.
author: Robert Y.
pros: It connects to all the major databases that I use. Has a great workflow. Always upgrading! Versatile.
cons: This is difficult, every time I have some sort of Con to talk about it ends up getting resolved in a subsequent version of the system. So really have none at the moment.

review_title: Right On The Money For RAD
description: I would definitely recommend this product as I use this professionally as well as personally to build applications in no time.

pros: We can create a full web-based application in a few hours with ASPRunner that is attached an already existing database. No hardcore programming skills required Provides responsive themes for mobile. Easy Installation.
cons: Have to build the whole application from scratch everytime. Sometimes crashes so better take backup every now and then.

cons: The api system. The sweet alert system.

review_title: AspRunner.net for fast solutions when time is the matter
description: been usign this product since early realeases, we think is software to keep, the solutions it provide rivals only with BI that are expensive its a must fon any DBA and data analizer
author: Mariano C.
pros: small curve of learning powerful solutions best relation money/usefullness many examples included great support
cons: Still unable to do cross server querys Framework good but needs flexibility in screen design

description: My overall experience with ASPRunner.Net has been a very positive experience. Me and my team can push out very complex application with speed and accuracy. Our end users love the finished apps and are all very comfortable with the UI.
author: Jerry A.
pros: ASPRunner.Net is very impressive. It can handle almost any data-driven business application you can think of. I love the ease of use, built in functionality, security features, responsive design, and the flexibility for extending the business logic with C# and JavaScript. I can’t imagine not having it. I am a frequent user of MS Visual Studio and to be honest, as much as I like Visual Studio, ASPRunner.Net gets the job done much, much faster. I am also a former user of Iron Speed Designer. I can tell you as a matter of fact, ASPRunner.Net is far better.
cons: I can't say there is anything I dislike. The one thing that did bug me for years was the overall look and feel of the finished app. That has been corrected 100% with the use of Bootstrap. The product just keeps getting better. XLinesoft has a very committed team and are extremely helpful and attentive to customer requests. The support is top notch.
author_profession: Manager, Web, Data Access and Automation

description: I have downloaded and trialled all the major competitor products over the years and can honestly say, this is the best overall product on the market. Yes there others that have some nice feature and look prettier, but none that can match ASPRUNNER.NET overall. The support and documentation are superb and I wouldn't use anything else
author: Richard O.
pros: This product give the convenience of a low/node code development or you can customise code to have it work exactly the way you need it to.
cons: Finished UI could be a little prettier and the templates provided could provide for a few more features that can be copied across to my projects

description: I was easily able to utilize the product without any programming knowledge and then learned JavaScript for additional functionality that I wanted to customize. The documentation is clear and concise with examples. The software walks you through each step to build your page or application. I have tried almost every other product and either they were complicated or more expensive with less features and cosmetics. This will save you countless days and you can achieve instant professional results in minutes!
author: Gerry T.
pros: Easy to setup, connect to any database or spreadsheet and utilization. You can use this with no programming knowledge although if you do you can make advanced web form functionality. Extremely fast development in minutes vs days.
cons: Theee is not anything that I found I do not like about the new version of ASPRunner 10.

description: I needed a custom calendar application that I could collect data from. Outlook and Google calendar just didn't give me the flexibility to do this. I purchased the add on for ASPRunner which allowed me to build exactly what i wanted.
author: David M.
pros: I first discovered this software about 5 years ago and have seen many additional features being added over the years. Fantastic product allowing you to build sophisticated websites in minutes.
cons: I've discovered a few bugs but the team at Xlinesoft have responded quickly and applied a fix.

description: Fantastic. Xlinesoft really stands behind their products. Their support is fast and efficient and they are active in user forums. Regular releases keep the product fresh and modern.
author: Jason L.
pros: Super easy to use. Wrote. Help desk ticketing system over the weekend that integrates with our phone system and accounting. Very fast and very stable.
cons: Wish there were more diversity in the included visual templates.

description: At my prior employer, we used ASPRunner.NET Enterprise (allowing Active Directory authentication) for dozens of internal niche applications. Most applications were up and running in production in a matter of days, which was but a fraction of what it would have taken to build a similar application "from scratch".
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really like how quickly you can develop a working application from an existing database, making it a extremely valuable tool for novices. However, it also has the ability to deeply customize, which makes it just as valuable for those with deeper skillsets.
cons: In prior versions of the software, updates to ASPRunner.NET would sometimes break web applications when they were republished. However, these issues have not be observed in more recent versions.
